title: Practice Exam Update & Exam 2 Info
content:
Hi Class

1) Practice Exam Correction: There was an issue with the Practice Exam and Answer Key for questions 5 & 12. 
I have updated those in Canvas.

2) I will hold Exam Office Hours on Monday, 10/20 from 5:00pm - 6:30pm in KOBL 467.  

3) Here are reminders for Exam 2:
Make sure to bring:

  • A #2 pencil 
  • A calculator
  • A Note Sheet (1 side of 1 page) - you must turn this in with your exam. Take a picture or scan if you want a copy. 
  • Write your student ID number on your note sheet (it is in the Buff portal). 

During the Exam:

  • Fill out your scantron when you get to the classroom. Including:
    • Last name, First name, Student ID number
    • Exam VERSION (A, B, C, D, E, or F)
    • Section # (I will write this on the board)
  • Write your name on the exam and sign the honor code statement (if you agree). 
  • 70 Minute exam. Pencils down at 70 minutes (ensure your scantron is filled in and the paper exam questions are completed). 

POINT DEDUCTIONS:

  • If your scantron is not filled in properly, there will be between a 2 and 5 point deduction per offence. Make sure to get this right!
  • If you do not have pencils down at 70 minutes there will be a 5 point deduction (at a minimum). 

However, the most important thing is to relax and do your best. 

-Jeremiah

A #2 pencil 
A calculator

Write your student ID number on your note sheet (it is in the Buff portal). 

During the Exam:

Last name, First name, Student ID number

Section # (I will write this on the board)


Write your name on the exam and sign the honor code statement (if you agree). 
70 Minute exam. Pencils down at 70 minutes (ensure your scantron is filled in and the paper exam questions are completed). 

POINT DEDUCTIONS:

If your scantron is not filled in properly, there will be between a 2 and 5 point deduction per offence. Make sure to get this right!
If you do not have pencils down at 70 minutes there will be a 5 point deduction (at a minimum). 

However, the most important thing is to relax and do your best.

author: Jeremiah Contreras
